name: W12 Morning Flow — Bodyweight Spine + Hip (All Days, Variety Week)
description: 15 min bodyweight floor flow — **universal W12 morning flow, used every training day** (Mon push / Tue KB / Wed pull / Thu KB / Fri legs). Same shape as W11 with rotated moves for variety. Three-part: spine primer → bodyweight work → deep stretch arc. Day-specific therapeutic add-on at the end (push = pec-minor protocol; pull = dead hang + scap pull; legs = 90s pigeon + supine twist; KB days skip — banded prep covers it).

sets.name: Primer — Wake the Spine (~3 min)

exercises.notes: Slow, full ROM each direction. Spine wave wakes the segment-by-segment articulation.
30s each side. Thoracic rotation + shoulder opener — same as W11, the rotation should reach further this week.
Knees under hips, chest sinks toward the floor with arms extended forward. **Lat + shoulder opener** — primes the overhead pattern that the morning will need.

sets.notes: Slightly different opener arc than W11 — drops the cobra pulse, adds puppy pose for the lat/shoulder stretch.

sets.name: Work Block — Bodyweight Activation (~5 min)

exercises.notes: 30s each side. Lunge + thoracic rotation — covers hip flexor + t-spine in one shape. **Replaces W11's inchworm-walkout** — same goal (full-body warm), different shape.
45s alternating. Plank with single-arm shoulder taps — anti-rotation under the hand-lift. **Replaces W11's plank-bird-dog** — different anti-rotation pattern.
45s alternating. From down-dog, draw one knee toward the forehead, hold a beat, switch. **Same as W11** — too good to drop, the core+hip+shoulder integration earns its place.
45s slow. Same as W11 — durable hip opener under plank load.
30s each side. Same as W11 — windmill on the floor, the lateral hinge cue translation.

sets.notes: World's greatest stretch + plank shoulder tap rotate in. Anti-rotation gets a different shape.

sets.name: Yoga Flow — Deep Stretch Arc (~7 min)

exercises.notes: 30s each side. **Stays every week** — signature spine move.
30s each direction. Quadruped hip abduction — slow, full ROM. **Replaces W11's hip-circle** — more abductor focus, complements the lateral hinge work in the loaded sessions.
30s each side. Hip flexor + adductor + back-leg quad. Drop to elbows if accessible. **Stays** — durable hip opener.
Bodyweight, slow. **Stays every week** — mirrors the Tuesday loaded cossack.
30s each side (the universal flow's version — legs day add-on does 90s for the QL protocol). **Replaces W11's mountain-to-pigeon** — back to the static hold for deeper release.
60s slow. Hip + lower back release. **Replaces W11's frog-pose-pulses** — gentler, easier to bail if not opening up that day.

sets.notes: Continuous arc — flow between shapes, breathe deeply.

sets.name: 📍 Day-Specific Add-On — Pick by Today's Training (~3-5 min)

exercises.notes: **📍 PUSH DAYS — KEY W9 PROTOCOL MOVE.** 30s each at LOW / MID / HIGH elbow positions. Arm bent 90°, forearm on door frame, step through and rotate torso AWAY. Desk work continuously re-tightens pec minor — daily.
**📍 PUSH DAYS** — Active side of the pec-minor fix. Lower trap + rotator cuff.
**📍 PUSH DAYS** — Serratus activation, helps unstick a tight pec minor.
**📍 PUSH DAYS (optional)** — Slow rotator cuff work. Add if shoulder feels off.
**📍 PUSH DAYS (optional)** — Pins shoulder blades in corrected position.
**📍 PULL DAYS** — 25s. Decompress shoulders, warm grip.
**📍 PULL DAYS** — Scapulae retracting only, no elbow bend. Crisp scap engagement before loaded pulls.
**📍 LEGS DAYS — W8 QL-SPASM PROTOCOL.** 90s each side (longer than the universal flow's 30s). The long hold is what lets QL/psoas release. **Non-negotiable on legs day.**
**📍 LEGS DAYS** — 60s each side. Gentle twist for the QL. Lacrosse-ball QL roll above iliac crest beforehand if available.
**📍 LEGS DAYS (optional)** — Deep hip flexor stretch.
**📍 LEGS DAYS (optional)** — Most direct quad + hip flexor stretch.

sets.notes: **Pick today's day-specific protocol — push / pull / legs.** ~3-5 min total. KB days (Tue/Thu) skip this block — the in-workout banded prep covers the equivalent.

tips: **Same shape as W11, rotated moves.** Variety keeps the flow interesting — same intent, different shapes.
**15 min main flow + 3-5 min day-specific add-on** — universal across W12 (Mon push / Tue KB / Wed pull / Thu KB / Fri legs).
**Scorpion + cossack BW + lizard pose stay every week** — durable spine + hip + adductor anchors.
Low lunge thoracic rotation + plank shoulder taps + fire hydrant + happy baby rotate in this week. Plank shoulder taps is a different anti-rotation pattern than W11's bird-dog.
**Day-specific add-on at the end** — push days do the pec-minor protocol, pull days do dead hang + scap pull, legs days do 90s pigeon + supine twist. KB days skip the add-on.
If short on time: scorpion + lizard + cossack BW + pigeon, plus today's day-specific add-on.
formPhilosophy: Same as W10/W11. Variety = different shapes hitting the same patterns. Scorpion-family spine work + hip openers + adductor stretches. Designed for home, structured around the in-workout banded prep's logic.
